CustomObject.description: Rule table mapping process/project attributes to NEPA challenge ground predictions. Each record targets one challenge ground and specifies the conditions that trigger the prediction.
CustomObject.label: NEPA Challenge Prediction Rule

fields.description: The NEPA challenge ground this rule predicts (e.g., EIS/EA Inadequacy, Failure to Supplement).
fields.label: Challenge Ground

fields.description: Review type that activates this rule (EIS, EA, CE, Other Authorization, or blank for any).
fields.label: Trigger Review Type

fields.description: Adjacent statute keyword that activates this rule (e.g., ESA, CWA, NHPA). Blank means not statute-dependent.
fields.label: Trigger Adjacent Statute

fields.description: Plain-language explanation written to nepa_challenge_prediction_notes__c when this rule fires.
fields.label: Explanation

fields.description: Sort order for display in predicted challenge grounds list. Lower number = listed first.
fields.label: Priority

fields.description: Additional risk points added to nepa_challenge_risk_delta__c on the IndividualApplication when this rule matches. Derived from PermitTEC v0.1 sector-circuit win-rate differentials.
fields.label: Risk Delta Points

fields.description: Primary sector value on the IndividualApplication that activates this rule (e.g., "Energy Production and Management"). Blank means not sector-dependent.
fields.label: Trigger Sector

fields.description: When true, this rule fires only when nepa_tribal_plaintiff_flag__c is true on the parent IndividualApplication. Used for the Tribal Plaintiff Override rule.
fields.label: Trigger Tribal Plaintiff Flag

fields.description: Whether this rule is currently active. SubscriberControlled so agencies can enable/disable rules without a package update.
fields.label: Active

fields.description: Date this record version becomes effective. Flows compare inp_EvaluationDate (= nepa_start_date__c on the IA) against this: only records where Effective_Start_Date__c IS NULL OR <= EvaluationDate are returned. Null = effective from the beginning of time.
fields.label: Effective Start Date

fields.description: Date after which this record version is no longer effective (EO 14270 sunset compliance). Flows filter: Sunset_Date__c IS NULL OR >= EvaluationDate. Null = no sunset.
fields.label: Sunset Date
